first_principles_validity_hypothesis: The prediction "I think each one has over 1,000 citations. So every singl..." is forced by the underlying constraint "Fundamentally the scaling offers one guaranteed path to s..."; if the constraint is not binding the prediction may still hold by accident but the binding case is the load-bearing version of this candidate.
why_novel_vs_speaker: The speaker introduces the prediction (snippet S007) and the first-principle (snippet S015) in separate contexts; the speaker does not state that the second forces the first.
why_potentially_useful: A prediction that is forced by a first-principle is more falsifiable than a free-floating prediction: if the principle holds and the prediction fails, one of them is wrong, which is a binary research question.
